code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut output = ""
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
mut first = true

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      if first
        output = "#{tok} #{tok}"
        first = false
      else
        output = "#{output} #{tok} #{tok}"
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start < n
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
  if first
    output = "#{tok} #{tok}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{tok} #{tok}"
  end
end

println(output)
